## Describe the bug
A clear description of what's wrong.

## To reproduce
Steps to reproduce:
1. Open '...'
2. Click '...'
3. See error

## Expected behaviour
What did you expect to happen?

## Screenshots
If applicable, drop a screenshot here.

## Environment
- OS: [e.g. macOS 15.4]
- Browser: [e.g. Safari 17.4 / Chrome 123]
- Language / Region: [e.g. zh-CN / Hong Kong]
- Currency: [e.g. HKD]
- Tax provider: [e.g. hk-salaries-tax]

## Additional context
Anything else worth knowing.
